summary: Iter-30 verified: 'ID: <employee_code>' now renders below the employee's name on both Home tab (testID=employee-code-display) and Profile tab (testID=profile-employee-code) after PIN login. Backend /auth/me and /auth/pin-login both return employee_code (SKS/UI2530001 style) — confirmed by 3 pytest smoke tests. Regression: company_admin does NOT see either testID on Home or Profile (both null). Super_admin regression validated indirectly through code path (same 'role === employee' guard) and backend /auth/me returning role=super_admin; live super_admin UI walk not performed to honour the 'DO NOT RESET SUPER ADMIN PIN' rule in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Edge case (employee_code === null) is safely handled by the truthy `user?.employee_code` check in the JSX guard on both screens.

issues: When an employee signs up by phone only (no email), the 'email' Text still renders as an empty string node between the 'ID:' line and the role chip. Cosmetically the ID→role spacing looks fine, but consider hiding the empty email row entirely (`user?.email ? <Text>{user.email}</Text> : null`).

action_items: Optional cosmetic: on profile.tsx line ~139, only render the email <Text> when user?.email is truthy — otherwise a stray empty line sits between the ID and role chip for phone-only employees.

Optional: remove/replace the deprecated 'shadow*' style props (browser console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow"'). Not related to this iteration but appearing across the app.
critical_code_review_comments: Guard `user?.role === 'employee' && user?.employee_code` is correct — it excludes company_admin, super_admin AND employees whose employee_code is null / '' / undefined, so the requested edge-case (null legacy row) is handled without an extra branch.
employee_code is the field name in both AuthUser (frontend) and _serialize_user (backend); no snake_case / camelCase mismatch.
seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral company (IT30UI8253 UICo, code UI253) + employee (UI2530001 / +919807940001 / PIN 426857) plus a company_admin (IT30ADMIN CoAdmin). ALL ephemeral rows deleted at the end of the run (2 companies, 2 users, 2 sessions removed). Super_admin PIN/session fields were NOT modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter30_employee_code_display.py is reusable — it seeds via mongo + /auth/employee-signup, so it doesn't depend on POST /companies preserving company_code. Uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL env var. To run: `EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=<url> MONGO_URL=<url> DB_NAME=test_database pytest backend/tests/test_iter30_employee_code_display.py -v`. Frontend token key in localStorage is 'llc_session_token' — useful for future tests that need to bypass PIN-change screens.
rca_of_issue: N/A — this was a feature verification, not a bug. The fix (adding <Text testID='employee-code-display'> under greetName in (tabs)/index.tsx and <Text testID='profile-employee-code'> in (tabs)/profile.tsx) both render correctly, are gated by `role==='employee' && employee_code` and use brand-coloured styling (colors.brandPrimary, fontWeight 700/800, small font).
